shape_summary: Flat array of one StandingEntry per team for the requested season.

pct.description: Winning percentage as a decimal between 0 and 1, rounded to 3 places.

gb.description: Games behind the division leader as a number, or the literal string '-' for the leader.

invariants: Array length is exactly 30 during the regular season.
Six (league, division) tuples are represented, with five teams each.
pct = wins / (wins + losses) for any team that has played any games.
The division leader has gb === '-' or gb === 0; all other teams in that division have a positive numeric gb.
error_behavior: Network failure or non-200 response throws a DataClientError.
